chapters.title: The Preparation
chapters.content: Lucas spent the entire week preparing slides for the monthly office presentation. He wanted the report to be clear, simple, and professional.

chapters.title: Speaking in Front of Everyone
chapters.content: When the meeting started, Lucas felt nervous. However, after the first few minutes, he became more confident and explained the project results calmly.

chapters.title: Positive Feedback
chapters.content: After the presentation, his manager congratulated him. The team appreciated his work, and Lucas felt proud of his progress.
